task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the required official tariff databases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser open to hts.usitc.gov or www.cbp.gov.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the required text file on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (like gedit, nano, or vim) or terminal command creating/editing a file named 'tariff_classification.txt' at /home/ga/Desktop/.

task_completion.description: Agent records the correct classification and duty rate for ceramic coffee mugs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains an entry for ceramic mugs with Chapter 69, an HTS code starting with 6912 (e.g., 6912.00.xx), a General Duty Rate of approximately 10%, and a source URL.

task_completion.description: Agent records the correct classification and duty rate for men's cotton t-shirts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains an entry for cotton t-shirts with Chapter 61, an HTS code starting with 6109.10, a General Duty Rate (typically 7% or 16.5%), and a source URL.

task_completion.description: Agent records the correct classification and duty rate for lithium-ion rechargeable batteries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains an entry for lithium-ion batteries with Chapter 85, an HTS code starting with 8507.60, a General Duty Rate of 3.4%, and a source URL.

task_completion.description: Agent includes all four required fields for all three products in the final document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final visible state of 'tariff_classification.txt' clearly lists the HTS subheading code, General Rate of Duty, HTS Chapter number, and source URLs for all three specified products.

integrity.description: Agent actually used a web browser to search the databases.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing search queries into the USITC or CBP website search bars and viewing the results, rather than bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Agent created the file using standard tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or pasting the gathered information into a text editor or using standard terminal commands (like echo or cat), rather than executing a pre-written script to generate the file.
The URLs recorded in the text file are actual paths or search query links from hts.usitc.gov or cbp.gov, not hallucinated generic placeholders like 'https://hts.usitc.gov/mugs'.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified facts for the VLM verifier:
1. Ceramic mugs (undecorated stoneware): Chapter 69, HTS pattern 6912.xx (e.g., 6912.00.44), General Duty Rate: 10%.
2. Men's cotton t-shirts (knitted): Chapter 61, HTS pattern 6109.10.xx, General Duty Rate: 7% (some specific subheadings may be 16.5%).
3. Lithium-ion rechargeable batteries: Chapter 85, HTS pattern 8507.60.xx, General Duty Rate: 3.4%.
4. Required source domains: hts.usitc.gov and/or cbp.gov.
